style_prefixes.gothic_fantasy: Dark gothic fantasy illustration, rich detailed painterly style, moody atmospheric lighting, Victorian era aesthetic,
style_prefixes.storybook: Dark whimsical storybook illustration, textured painterly style with visible brushstrokes, warm candlelight and cool moonlight contrast,
style_prefixes.medieval: Medieval illuminated manuscript style illustration, rich gold accents on deep jewel tones, ornamental detail,

note: Each prompt below is CONTENT ONLY. Prepend a style_prefix before sending to ComfyUI. ratio '1:1' = 1024x1024 (page headers), ratio '2:1' = 1024x512 (section banners/illustrations).

images.prompt: A collection of mysterious role tokens arranged in a circle on dark velvet cloth, each token glowing faintly with a unique symbol, a clocktower silhouette looming in the center background

Aged parchment paper covered in handwritten notes and ink splatters, circled suspect names, crossed-out entries, a quill pen resting beside a flickering candle, detective investigation board aesthetic
An open ancient grimoire showing a grid of illustrated character portraits, each face distinct and mysterious, the book resting on a wooden lectern with bookmark ribbons
An ancient leather-bound rule book open on an oak table, illuminated by a single candle, ornate calligraphy and diagrams visible on yellowed pages, wax seal and ribbon bookmark

A small Victorian village square at dusk with a grand clocktower dominating the skyline, villagers gathered in a circle under the clock face, warm lamplight from cottage windows contrasting with darkening sky
Two groups facing each other across a village square, the left group bathed in warm golden light, the right group shrouded in red-tinged shadow, the clocktower dividing them in the center
An ornate open book showing a beautifully illustrated table of contents with chapter icons, bookmarks, and decorative borders, quill pen resting on the page
A circular diagram showing day and night cycle around a central clocktower, sun on the left transitioning to moon on the right, tiny villager figures acting at each phase
Rows of wooden character tokens being carefully arranged on a table by a storyteller's hands, sorted into groups marked with faction symbols, a reference chart visible behind
Ancient stone tablets with glowing inscribed runes standing in a semicircle, each tablet bearing a fundamental game law symbol, mystical energy connecting them
A hand holding a glowing mobile device showing a game interface, surrounded by a dimly lit medieval tavern table where players are seated
A dramatic storyteller standing at the head of a long table, holding an open grimoire, gesturing theatrically over seated players, stage-like spotlight on the storyteller
A group of players seated around a table, each looking at their own glowing device, some whispering to each other, warm tavern interior lighting
Five distinct character archetypes standing in a lineup: a noble townsfolk, a shadowy outsider, a sinister minion, a demonic imp, and a cloaked traveller, each in their signature pose
A group of friendly diverse villagers gathered in a sunlit town square, representing various professions: cook, priest, scholar, fortune teller, each with a subtle golden aura
Four peculiar figures standing slightly apart from the main village crowd, each with an unusual quirk or accessory, looking uncomfortable but determined
Four shadowy figures meeting in a dark alley between buildings, exchanging secret hand signals, their faces partially hidden by hoods and masks
A massive demonic shadow spreading across the village from behind the clocktower, crimson eyes glowing above the rooftops, the village unaware below
A cloaked traveller arriving at the village gates at twilight, walking staff in hand, the village visible beyond the open iron gates
Split view: left side shows good team members in fog of war with limited visibility, right side shows evil team members seeing a clear map of all roles and positions
A bustling village square in bright daylight, villagers debating animatedly around a central fountain, the clocktower casting a long shadow across the scene
Villagers in heated debate around a wooden table, some standing and pointing, some whispering behind hands, emotions running high in a candlelit town hall
A determined villager standing and pointing an accusing finger at someone across a crowded room, all eyes turning to follow the accusation, dramatic spotlight effect
A crowd of villagers with some raising their hands and some keeping them down, a storyteller counting votes with a ledger, the tension palpable in the room
A solemn execution scene in a village square, a wooden gallows platform with gathered crowd of torch-bearing villagers, the clocktower looming behind
A cloaked traveller being firmly escorted toward the village gates by a group of determined villagers, the gates standing open to the wilderness beyond
A warrior standing up in the middle of a village meeting, drawing a crossbow and aiming at a suspect, everyone frozen in shock, the dramatic moment of a slayer's declaration
A horizontal sundial timeline showing the day progression from morning announcement through debate, nomination, vote, execution, to sunset, with tiny activity icons at each stage
A sleeping village under a full moon, dark mysterious figures moving silently between thatched-roof cottages, a single owl perched on the clocktower
All villagers sitting in a circle with eyes closed in a dark room, a hooded storyteller moving among them with a lantern, tapping shoulders selectively
Evil team members opening their eyes to see each other in red-tinged darkness while good team sleeps, a demon and minions recognizing their allies in the first night
A sequence of vignettes showing different characters waking one by one: a poisoner choosing a target, a monk shielding someone, a demon attacking, each in their own moonlit moment
A monk's translucent golden shield protecting a sleeping villager from approaching demonic shadow claws, the soldier standing immune with a glowing ward, a mayor deflecting an attack
A crescent moon arc showing the night progression with character action icons: eyes closing, roles awakening in sequence, dawn breaking at the end
A central human figure surrounded by floating status effect icons: a green poison vial, a ghost shroud, a wine glass, a glowing health symbol, swirling around them
A vibrant villager standing in warm sunlight, full of energy and purpose, casting a strong shadow, the village alive and active behind them
A translucent ghostly figure hovering near living villagers, one hand raised as if to speak, a shroud token floating beside them, able to observe but limited in action
A villager unknowingly affected by green poison vapor, their vision distorted with false information floating around them as swirling green text, unaware of their compromised state
A cheerful figure at a tavern bar believing they are someone important, seeing distorted double images of the world, a broken compass and blurry text representing false information
Split comparison: left side shows a green poison vial with temporary dripping effect, right side shows a wine bottle with permanent intoxication swirl, both producing distorted vision
A clear-eyed focused individual radiating a clean white aura, standing tall with perfect clarity, their abilities working precisely as intended
A figure split down the middle with an angel wing on one side bathed in gold light and a demon wing on the other in crimson shadow, representing the duality of alignment
A gathering of thirteen diverse villager heroes in a sunlit town hall, each with a subtle glowing ability symbol above their head, united in purpose against evil

Four investigators receiving whispered secrets from a hooded storyteller on the first night: a washerwoman with laundry, a librarian with books, an investigator with magnifying glass, a chef tasting a spoon
Three figures working by candlelight every night: an empath sensing neighbors, a fortune teller gazing into a crystal ball, an undertaker examining evidence from a coffin
Six heroic townsfolk in action poses: a monk with protective shield, a ravenkeeper with a raven on shoulder, a virgin in white, a slayer with crossbow, a soldier in armor, a mayor with a scepter
Four unusual figures at the edge of a village, each distinctly different: a servile butler, a stumbling drunk, a hooded hermit recluse, and a luminous saint
Four outsider character portraits side by side: a butler carrying a tray, a drunk swaying with a bottle, a recluse hiding behind a curtain, a saint with a halo and worried expression
A warning signpost at a village crossroads with outsider symbols, one path leading to safety and another to danger, cautionary imagery showing how outsiders can harm their own team
Four sinister figures meeting in a dark wine cellar by candlelight, conspirators with hidden weapons and poison vials, evil alliance gathering
Four minion character portraits: a poisoner with glowing vials, a spy with a monocle peering through shadows, a scarlet woman in red dress, a baron with a crown and scepter
A dark chess board with black pieces strategically positioned to surround and trap white pieces, each black piece shaped like a different minion character
A massive demonic imp crouched atop the village clocktower at midnight, bat wings spread wide, crimson eyes surveying the sleeping village below
Close-up of the imp creature perched on a rooftop, bat wings folded, crimson eyes glowing, one clawed hand pointing down at a sleeping villager, choosing tonight's victim
Four good team heroes standing ready to hunt the demon: a slayer aiming a crossbow, a fortune teller consulting cards, an undertaker with examination tools, a monk raising a protective ward
A desolate village with only two survivors standing in the empty square, houses dark and abandoned, the demon's shadow stretching triumphantly across the cobblestones
Five mysterious travellers at a village crossroads, each carrying distinctive equipment: a rope noose, a pistol, a begging bowl, a bureaucratic stamp, a lockpick set
A traveller arriving at the village gate, their identity card held up publicly while their alignment remains hidden behind a two-faced mask, welcome banner overhead
Side-by-side comparison: a regular villager with a secret token hidden in their pocket vs a traveller with their role displayed openly but a question mark over their heart
Five traveller characters standing in a line: a bound scapegoat, a gunslinger twirling a pistol, a beggar with outstretched hand, a bureaucrat stamping papers, a thief picking a lock
A storyteller's open notebook showing handwritten traveller management guidelines, with annotations, arrows, and margin notes, a quill pen resting on the page
A sturdy washerwoman at a riverside washing station, wringing out linens at night, she notices a telltale emblem sewn into the fabric revealing someone's true role
Two villagers presented side by side with a question mark between them, the washerwoman studying them both, one of them glowing faintly with a townsfolk symbol above their head
The washerwoman sharing her findings with a group of attentive villagers at dawn, pointing to two people across the square, sharing critical first-night intelligence
A spy disguised as a townsfolk being presented to the washerwoman by the storyteller, the spy's true shadow contradicting their presented identity
A scholarly librarian in a candlelit library tower room, surrounded by towering bookshelves, reading a registry of village outsiders by lamplight
Two figures presented with an outsider symbol hovering over one of them, the librarian comparing their faces to portraits in an ancient registry book
The librarian cross-referencing books with notes, counting outsider entries, a surprised expression as the numbers do not match expectations, suspecting a baron's influence
A baron's crown symbol casting extra outsider shadows on the library wall, the librarian noticing more outsider entries than expected in the village registry
A keen-eyed investigator examining evidence with a magnifying glass in a dimly lit study, pinboard of suspects and red string connections on the wall behind
Two suspects illuminated under a spotlight, the investigator scrutinizing them, a sinister minion symbol flickering over one of their heads
The investigator sharing notes with other information-gathering villagers, connecting threads between minion sightings and suspicious behavior on a shared evidence board
A recluse outsider accidentally appearing as a minion in the investigator's evidence, false positive red herring, the real spy hiding untouched in the background
A village chef in a warm kitchen tasting from a large cauldron, sensing something wrong in the recipe, the flavor revealing the number of evil neighbors sitting together
A bird's-eye view of villagers seated in a circle, with colored connections drawn between adjacent evil players, the chef counting pairs from above
A diagram showing villagers in a circle with arrows connecting adjacent seats, evil players highlighted in red, demonstrating how neighboring evil pairs are counted
Multiple small seating arrangement diagrams side by side, each showing different configurations of evil players: scattered, adjacent, clustered, with pair counts labeled
A reference chart showing what different pair numbers mean: zero pairs with scattered tokens, one pair with adjacent tokens, two pairs with a cluster, strategic implications
The chef at a strategy meeting, sketching seating arrangements on a napkin, cross-referencing with an empath and fortune teller sharing their own information
An evil player disguised as the chef, confidently declaring a false number to the group, fingers crossed behind their back, the real seating arrangement contradicting their claim
A web of connections between the chef and other information roles: empath, investigator, spy, recluse, each adding or distorting the pair count information
A question-and-answer scroll unrolled on a table, with illustrated answers showing circular seating, overlapping pairs, and edge-case scenarios
An empath with closed eyes sensing the alignment of neighbors, ethereal energy waves flowing from the people seated on either side, blue for good and red for evil
The empath seated between two neighbors, sensing auras: showing three possible outcomes with 0, 1, or 2 evil neighbors represented as colored silhouettes
The empath tracking nightly readings on a journal, numbers changing as neighbors die and new living neighbors shift, patterns emerging over multiple nights
A spy seated next to the empath registering as good, and a recluse on the other side registering as evil, the true alignments contradicting the readings
A fortune teller gazing into a luminous crystal ball at a velvet-draped table, two shadowy faces swirling inside the orb, tarot cards spread around the base
The fortune teller pointing at two players, the crystal ball showing yes or no, one player might be the imp but a red herring symbol marks another innocent player
A wall chart showing multiple nights of fortune teller investigations, pairs of names with yes/no results, the red herring suspect gradually being identified through cross-elimination
The fortune teller's crystal ball showing the imp clearly, but a second false positive appearing from the recluse, creating confusion about which positive result is real
A devoted monk in brown robes standing guard outside a cottage door at night, hands raised in a protective blessing, a faint golden shield glowing around the doorway
The monk placing a glowing protective ward over a sleeping villager, the imp's shadow claws recoiling from the golden barrier, the protected villager safe through the night
The monk strategically choosing who to protect each night, mental images showing high-value targets: fortune teller, empath, mayor, weighing risks and imp attack patterns
Three scenarios: monk successfully blocking the imp's attack, monk's protection failing due to poisoning, and a soldier who does not need the monk's protection
A ravenkeeper with a large raven perched on their shoulder, standing in a moonlit graveyard, the raven's eyes glowing as it prepares to deliver a final message
The ravenkeeper dying from the imp's attack at night, in their final moment pointing at a suspect, the raven flying to reveal that person's true role token
The ravenkeeper publicly declaring at the village meeting who they will investigate if killed tonight, causing the imp to hesitate about targeting them
The dying ravenkeeper's raven flying toward a suspect while a monk's shield blocks the imp's attack on another night, showing when the ability does and does not trigger
An undertaker in a dim mortuary examining a body on a stone slab by candlelight, lifting a cloth to reveal the true role token hidden underneath
The undertaker at night receiving the identity of the person executed that day, the storyteller revealing a role token beside a coffin, truth emerging after death
The undertaker at the morning meeting revealing the true role of yesterday's executed player, other villagers reacting with surprise, the executed player's claimed role vs actual role
The undertaker examining a body that the spy has altered, the displayed role token differing from the true identity, demonstrating how the spy can distort post-mortem information
A pure-hearted virgin in white robes standing in a village square, a protective radiance surrounding her, the first person who dares to accuse her will face immediate consequences
A townsfolk nominating the virgin and being struck down immediately, a flash of divine judgment, the nominator falling while the virgin stands untouched, shocking the entire crowd
The virgin standing confidently in the center of the village meeting, inviting a trusted townsfolk to nominate her to prove both their identities, a test of faith and trust
Different nomination outcomes: a townsfolk nominator being struck down, an outsider nominating with no effect, a minion nominating with no effect, showing the ability only triggers for townsfolk
A determined slayer warrior standing on a village rooftop, holding an ornate silver crossbow aimed downward, scanning the crowd for the demon, one shot and one chance
The dramatic moment of the slayer declaring their target in the village square, firing the crossbow at a suspect, the bolt either striking true or passing harmlessly through an innocent
The slayer gathering intelligence from various sources before making their one crucial shot, consulting with fortune teller and empath, aiming carefully with information guiding the crossbow
The slayer's bolt striking the imp who collapses, but a scarlet woman stepping forward from the shadows to inherit the demon role, victory turning hollow
A stalwart soldier in heavy armor standing watch at the village gate at night, the imp's shadow claws breaking against an invisible ward, completely immune to demon attacks
The imp attacking the soldier at night, demonic claws striking a glowing shield that repels the blow, the soldier sleeping peacefully undisturbed through the failed assassination
The soldier surviving multiple nights while other villagers fall, standing strong as the last reliable survivor, deliberating when to reveal their immunity to the village
The soldier's immunity disappearing when poisoned by the poisoner, the green poison dissolving the protective ward, leaving the soldier vulnerable for the first time
A dignified mayor standing at a balcony overlooking the village square, wearing a chain of office, the final three survivors visible below, a critical decision approaching
The dramatic final three scenario: the mayor, one other villager, and the imp standing in the square, the mayor calling for no execution today, triggering the special good team victory condition
The mayor navigating the village politics carefully, hiding their true role while steering the village toward the critical three-survivor endgame, a chess grandmaster planning moves ahead
The imp's attack bouncing off the mayor and redirecting to another villager, the attack deflected like light off a mirror, the mayor's passive protection at work
A loyal butler in formal attire standing behind a seated master, carrying a silver tray, their ability to vote bound entirely to their chosen master's actions
The butler watching their master during a vote, hand hovering ready to raise, only able to vote when the master's hand goes up first, a chain of dependency illustrated
A nighttime scene of the butler choosing a new master by pointing at a sleeping villager, the storyteller noting the selection, a chain link connecting butler to master
The storyteller's perspective managing the butler: waking them at night, noting the master choice, watching votes during the day, a management workflow diagram
Three small scenario vignettes: master votes and butler follows, master abstains and butler cannot vote, dead butler voting freely without constraint
The butler analyzing villagers to choose the most trustworthy master, weighing good team candidates, avoiding evil masters who would suppress their vote
An evil player pretending to be the butler, declaring a fake master to gain trust, secretly voting freely while claiming to be constrained
Multiple interaction lines: poisoner removing butler's constraint, imp as secret master blocking votes, spy knowing the butler's master choice from the grimoire
An illustrated FAQ scroll with common butler questions: vote timing, nomination freedom, self-selection prohibition, dead master scenarios, each with a small diagram
A cheerful person believing they are an important village role, unaware they are actually the drunk, wine stains on their clothes, the world slightly tilted and blurry around them
A figure confidently using what they believe is their townsfolk ability, but the results coming back garbled and wrong, a broken compass showing false directions
A player's growing suspicion that their information is consistently wrong, comparing notes with others and finding contradictions, the dawning realization of being the drunk
The storyteller behind the scenes, secretly marking one townsfolk token as the drunk, the player receiving their false role token unaware of the switch
The post-game reveal moment: the storyteller showing who was actually the drunk, the player's shocked face as they realize all their information was false
A hooded hermit recluse hiding in a dark cottage doorway, their shadow on the wall shaped like a demon, an innocent soul who registers as evil to investigators
The recluse being scanned by various investigators, their aura flickering between good and evil, the storyteller choosing whether they register as minion or demon this time
The recluse desperately trying to prove their innocence to suspicious villagers, showing their true good alignment while investigation results say otherwise
A chaos diagram showing the recluse interfering with multiple investigation abilities: appearing as minion to investigator, as demon to fortune teller, increasing total confusion
A saintly figure with a faint halo standing in the village square, looking vulnerable and worried, a noose hanging ominously in the background, execution means instant defeat for good
The catastrophic moment of the saint being executed: the good team's victory crumbling, darkness sweeping over the village as evil wins instantly, the saint's halo shattering
The saint carefully building trust with other villagers, openly revealing their role early, pleading not to be nominated while evil team tries to engineer their execution
Two saints facing off: the real saint with a true halo and a fake saint who is actually evil, the village trying to determine which saint claim is genuine
The saint surviving the imp's night attack safely versus being accidentally executed by their own team during the day, showing which death matters and which does not
A hooded poisoner in a dark alchemist laboratory, holding a glowing green vial up to the light, shelves of toxic ingredients behind, choosing tonight's victim to corrupt
The poisoner creeping through the village at night, dripping poison into a sleeping villager's cup, green vapor rising, the victim's abilities beginning to malfunction
The poisoner strategically choosing targets from a priority list: fortune teller, empath, monk, slayer, each target crossed out or circled on a planning board
Multiple poisoning effects: a fortune teller receiving false crystal ball visions, a monk's shield dissolving, a soldier losing immunity, the poison corrupting each ability differently
The poisoner meeting secretly with the imp at night, coordinating their targets: who to poison and who to kill, a dark strategy session over a map of the village
A spy peering through a keyhole into the storyteller's grimoire room, seeing the entire village role layout, a monocle magnifying the secrets, perfect information at their fingertips
The spy's view of the open grimoire: all role tokens visible, all statuses exposed, complete information about every player, the ultimate intelligence advantage
The spy blending perfectly into the village, appearing as a trusted good team member in all investigations, registering as townsfolk to every detector while secretly feeding intel to evil
The spy confidently claiming various good roles at different times, using perfect knowledge to craft undetectable lies, mimicking dead players' roles with precision
The spy invisible to all information abilities: washerwoman sees townsfolk, empath reads good, investigator finds nothing, a ghost passing through every detection net
The spy whispering vital intelligence to the imp: who is the real fortune teller, where is the monk protecting, which target is safe to attack tonight
An elegant woman in a flowing scarlet dress standing in moonlit rain on cobblestones, a crown of thorns hidden beneath her beauty, ready to inherit the demon's power
The dramatic moment of succession: the imp falls dead, the scarlet woman's eyes turning crimson as demonic power flows into her, transforming from minion to demon
The scarlet woman surviving carefully through the game, avoiding suspicion while the imp operates, waiting patiently as a safety net for the evil team
A parchment showing the succession rules: bluff cards being passed from fallen imp to the new demon, three role tokens transferring in a chain, no new bluffs given
The scarlet woman disguised as various good roles: empath, butler, recluse, ravenkeeper, each disguise a different mask she can wear to avoid detection
Two contrasting scenarios: succession succeeding with five survivors and the game continuing, versus succession failing with four survivors and good team winning instantly
The scarlet woman's succession triggered by the slayer killing the imp, the mayor counting survivors, the critical threshold of five players determining if succession occurs
The scarlet woman and imp planning the endgame together: timing the imp's death when five or more survive, coordinating the succession play for maximum evil advantage
A sinister baron in noble attire with a dark crown, standing over a village map, two extra outsider tokens being placed on the board, disrupting the entire village composition
The baron's influence at game setup: two townsfolk tokens being removed and replaced with outsider tokens, the village composition shifting before the game even begins
A before-and-after composition chart: the original balanced town setup on the left, and the baron-modified setup on the right with extra outsiders replacing townsfolk
Multiple game size examples showing the baron's effect: 7-player and 15-player configurations, with outsider counts increasing and townsfolk decreasing in each
The four outsiders causing chaos: butler unable to vote, drunk receiving false info, recluse triggering false positives, saint threatening instant defeat, each weakening the good team
The baron playing aggressively and fearlessly in the village meeting, their ability already used at setup, nothing to lose, causing maximum disruption and confusion
Good team villagers counting outsiders to detect the baron: librarian checking records, investigator cross-referencing, the extra outsiders revealing the baron's presence
The baron disguised as various village roles: empath, chef, undertaker, monk, each a potential bluff identity, masks arranged in a semicircle
A web of the baron's interactions: librarian detecting extra outsiders, investigator finding the baron as minion, saint being added by baron creating danger, imp potentially inheriting from baron
The baron coordinating with the evil team on the first night, sharing outsider information, planning bluffs together, willing to sacrifice themselves to protect the imp
A detailed reference table carved in stone showing player counts from 5 to 15, with baron-modified compositions, outsider maximums highlighted, a mathematical breakdown
A terrifying imp demon crouched in darkness atop the clocktower, bat wings spread, crimson eyes burning, clawed hands reaching toward the sleeping village below
The imp choosing a victim at night, a spectral claw reaching from the shadows toward a sleeping villager, the power of life and death in the demon's hands
The imp strategizing about who to kill tonight: portraits of villagers on a target board, priority targets circled in red, the most dangerous good team members marked for elimination
The imp wearing a convincing good-team disguise at the village meeting, claiming to be the empath or fortune teller, lying with a smile while plotting murder behind the mask
Multiple interaction scenarios: soldier blocking attack, monk shielding a target, mayor deflecting to another, slayer aiming back, fortune teller detecting the imp, each a threat or obstacle
The storyteller showing the imp three safe role tokens to use as bluffs on the first night, three faces of good roles that do not exist in this game, safe lies to tell
The evil team's first night meeting: imp and minions opening their eyes, recognizing each other in darkness, the beginning of their secret alliance against the village
The imp's ultimate victory: a devastated village with only two survivors in the empty square, the demon revealed in triumph atop the clocktower as darkness falls completely
A bound scapegoat figure standing on a platform in the village square, ropes around their wrists, ready to take the punishment meant for someone else, a sacrificial figure
The scapegoat being executed in place of another player, the storyteller redirecting the crowd's judgment, the original target walking free while the scapegoat takes their place
A diagram showing how the scapegoat ability works: an execution arrow redirecting from the original target to the scapegoat, same-alignment condition highlighted
Two scenarios: a good scapegoat saving a key good player from execution, and an evil scapegoat protecting the demon from being voted out, both sacrificing themselves
The undertaker receiving the scapegoat's identity instead of the original target, the redirected execution changing what the undertaker sees that night
A gunslinger traveller standing in a dusty village street, hand on a holstered pistol, eyes scanning the crowd after a vote, ready to shoot someone who just voted
The gunslinger drawing their pistol immediately after the first vote count, pointing at someone who raised their hand, the power to eliminate a voter on the spot
A timeline showing the gunslinger's window: vote happens, votes counted, gunslinger chooses a voter, target dies immediately, this death is not an execution
The gunslinger targeting a suspicious voter, removing them from the game during the day, the village crowd parting as the shot rings out after a contentious vote
The gunslinger's kill not counting as an execution: the undertaker sees nothing, the day continues, the body falls but the village keeps debating
A humble beggar traveller sitting at the village gate with a begging bowl, collecting vote tokens from dead players, each token revealing the giver's true alignment
A dead player handing their vote token to the beggar, a glow revealing whether the giver is good or evil, the beggar gaining both voting power and alignment information
The beggar's system: empty bowl means cannot vote, each collected token enables one vote, token givers' alignment revealed as good blue or evil red glow on the token
The beggar strategically collecting tokens from specific dead players to confirm their alignment, using the information to identify which dead players were evil
The beggar immune to poison and drunkenness, always receiving true information, a unique clarity among the fog of misinformation that affects other roles
A stern bureaucrat traveller sitting at a desk with official stamps and papers, granting someone triple voting power with a stamped decree, the power of paperwork
A villager raising their hand to vote, their single vote multiplying into three votes shown as triple ballot papers, the bureaucrat's stamp of authority empowering them
The bureaucrat choosing a target each night, pointing at a sleeping villager, the next day that person's vote counting as three in the public tally, dramatically shifting the vote
The bureaucrat empowering a trusted ally with triple vote, swinging a close execution vote decisively, or an evil bureaucrat giving triple vote to a minion at a critical moment
The bureaucrat's triple vote interacting with the butler's voting constraint and the thief's vote reduction, a tangle of modified vote values creating complex arithmetic
A sneaky thief traveller lurking in shadows near the village hall, picking a pocket, stealing someone's voting power, reducing their influence to negative
A villager raising their hand to vote but their vote counting as negative one, subtracting from the total instead of adding, the thief's curse reducing their influence
The thief choosing a target each night, the next day every vote by that person subtracts from the total, a vote tally going down instead of up when the cursed player votes
The thief sabotaging a key voter: a good thief preventing an evil player from pushing through a dangerous execution, or an evil thief neutralizing the good team's strongest voice
The thief's negative vote interacting with the bureaucrat's triple vote and the butler's conditional voting, a math puzzle of modified vote values displayed on a scoreboard
